name: Alaska Omelette
recipeIngredient: 105 g Canned pink Alaska salmon, drained and flaked
2 tbsp Sour cream or fromage frais
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned salmon and set aside.
2. Beat together the eggs, sour cream or fromage frais, and tarragon in a bowl. Season lightly with salt and white pepper.
3. Melt the butter in a non-stick omelette pan over moderate heat.
4. Pour in the egg mixture and cook until the base is set.
5. While the base is setting, preheat a moderate grill.
6. Arrange the drained canned salmon over the soft top of the omelette.
7. Place the pan under the grill until the omelette is fully cooked.
8. Loosen the omelette in the pan and carefully fold it in half.
9. Slide the omelette onto a serving plate and garnish with salad, if desired.
Serves 1. Approx. 415 kcals per serving
